new_value: Day scholars receive ₹1,500 per year; Hostellers receive ₹3,000 per year.

new_value: Class 1-5 receives ₹1,000 per year. Class 6-10 receives up to ₹5,000 per year for day scholars, and up to ₹10,000 per year for hostellers.

title: Pragyan Bharati Scheme

title: IRDP Scholarship
new_value: Financial assistance ranges from ₹300 to ₹1,200 per year depending on the gender and course level of the student.

new_value: Scholarship stipend ranges from ₹100 to ₹300 per month (total ₹1,200 to ₹3,600 per year) depending on the stage of education.

title: Tripura State Merit Scholarship
new_value: Financial assistance ranges from ₹100 to ₹500 per month (total ₹1,200 to ₹6,000 per year) based on merit ranking and course stage.

title: Sikkim State Merit Scholarship

title: Arunachal Pradesh State Merit Scholarship
new_value: Merit stipend of up to ₹6,000 per year depending on the course stream and category of study.

title: Ladakh UT Merit Scholarship
new_value: Financial grant of up to ₹10,000 per year depending on course level and category.

title: Andaman & Nicobar Administration Merit Scholarship
new_value: Merit scholarship assistance ranging from ₹5,000 to ₹12,000 per year for resident students of Andaman and Nicobar Islands.

title: Infosys Foundation Fellowship (select programs)
new_value: Stipend of ₹25,000 to ₹35,000 per month (total ₹3.0 Lakh to ₹4.2 Lakh per year) for selected PhD scholars and researchers.

title: Siemens Scholarship Program
new_value: Reimbursement of tuition fees (up to ₹1 Lakh per year) plus an additional allowance of ₹20,000 per year for books, stationery, and hostel/living expenses.

title: Godrej Scholarship (CSR Initiatives)
new_value: Financial assistance of ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 per year targeting students from underprivileged families.

title: Bosch CSR Scholarship
new_value: Financial aid ranging from ₹10,000 to ₹40,000 per year for ITI, diploma, and undergraduate engineering students.

title: Acumen India Fellowship
new_value: Fully funded fellowship covering all seminar fees, lodging, meals, and programmatic travel. No direct cash stipends are paid to fellows.
